title: API key missing for Ghost Genius HTTP Request
symptom: When executing the HTTP request node for Ghost Genius, a '401, API key is requested' error is displayed, indicating that the API key is not being recognized.
applies_when: Using Ghost Genius HTTP Request node
not_this_if: API key is correctly set in query parameters
root_cause: The error occurs because the API key is not being sent correctly in the request. When using Header Auth, the API key must be included in the headers, but it may not be configured properly, leading to the server rejecting the request.
fix_steps: Open the Ghost Genius HTTP Request node settings
Ensure the API key is set in the headers correctly
If necessary, switch to using the query parameter for the API key
Save the workflow and test the request again
agent_instruction: Check the API key configuration in the Ghost Genius HTTP Request node and ensure it is set correctly in the headers or switch to query parameters.
